video.title: APIs Are Not Enough: Speediance, Whoop, Garmin, and Your Data
video.description:
A focused fitness-tech segment on why the real prize is getting your own data: Speediance endpoints, Whoop's limited API, Garmin's device behavior, MCPs, APIs, and why AI workflows depend on data access.

Edit note: Starts at the tools/APIs bridge instead of repeating the earlier LLM theory.

This is a topic-edited cut from the livestream: https://youtube.com/live/1liD1s8HlsQ?feature=share

Original livestream timestamp range(s): 25:55-34:22

Not medical, legal, financial, or training advice. Personal experience and commentary.

#AIAgents #FitnessTech #JiuJitsu
